metadata.title: Mithril Snapshot UX Refinement Tasks
metadata.description: Decompose MithrilBootstrap into sub-components with stepper UX, download metadata, stage-specific errors, custom chain storage, theming, i18n, Storybook, and E2E tests

phases.name: Backend Type & Pipeline Extensions
phases.description: Extend shared types and backend progress pipeline to carry file counts and error stage

tasks.title: Extend shared types
tasks.description: Add filesDownloaded, filesTotal to MithrilBootstrapStatusUpdate and stage to MithrilBootstrapError

tasks.title: Update mithrilProgress parser
tasks.description: Preserve raw files_downloaded and files_total in MithrilProgressUpdate instead of only converting to percentage

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapService progress
tasks.description: Include filesDownloaded/filesTotal in _updateStatus() calls. Annotate errors with stage: 'download' | 'verify' | 'convert'

tasks.title: Annotate node-start failure stage
tasks.description: Set error.stage to 'node-start' in handleDiskSpace.ts where failed status is reported

tasks.title: Update backend unit tests
tasks.description: Verify filesDownloaded/filesTotal preservation and stage annotation on errors

phases.name: Store & Container Updates
phases.description: Extend MobX store with download metadata observables and computed properties

tasks.title: Add store observables and computeds
tasks.description: Add @observable filesDownloaded, filesTotal and @computed bytesDownloaded, throughputBps to MithrilBootstrapStore. Update _updateStatus to assign file counts.

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage progress metadata wiring
tasks.description: Pass filesDownloaded/filesTotal and derived bytesDownloaded/throughputBps from MithrilBootstrapStore through the container to the component contract for the upcoming progress UX.

tasks.title: Update MithrilBootstrapPage chain storage wiring
tasks.description: Pass chain storage state and actions through to the component once custom storage store actions exist.

phases.name: Custom Chain Storage Location
phases.description: IPC channels, ChainStorageManager, symlink handling, and store actions for custom chain/db directory redirection

tasks.title: Add chain storage shared types
tasks.description: Add ChainStorageConfig and ChainStorageValidation types to mithril-bootstrap.types.ts

tasks.title: Add chain storage IPC channels
tasks.description: Define SET/GET_CHAIN_STORAGE_DIRECTORY channels in api.ts with main-side handlers and renderer-side clients

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - validation and config
tasks.description: Create chainStorageManager.ts with validate(targetDir) to check writable/sufficient space/not inside stateDir, and getConfig() to read chain-storage-config.json

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - setDirectory and migrateData
tasks.description: Add setDirectory(targetDir) to migrate data, create symlink (POSIX or NTFS junction), persist config. Add migrateData(from, to) with fs.move() and cross-device fallback. Use fs.lstat() to detect symlinks vs real directories.

tasks.title: ChainStorageManager - resetToDefault and verifySymlink
tasks.description: Add resetToDefault() to copy data back, remove symlink, remove config. Add verifySymlink() to check target exists on startup and return diagnostic if broken.

tasks.title: Add validate-only chain storage IPC channel
tasks.description: Introduce a non-destructive chain storage validation IPC request so the directory picker can show validation feedback without triggering migration/symlink side effects.

tasks.title: Add setDirectory rollback safety
tasks.description: Harden setDirectory with rollback/restore behavior when symlink switch fails after migration so stateDir/chain remains usable.

tasks.title: handleDiskSpace lint debt cleanup
tasks.description: Clean up legacy ts-ignore/any/shadowed-name lint debt in handleDiskSpace.ts to reduce maintenance friction while preserving behavior.

tasks.title: Integrate ChainStorageManager with disk space and downloads
tasks.description: Resolve symlinks via fs.realpath() before checkDiskSpace(). Pass custom directory as workDir to MithrilBootstrapService. Use resolved real paths in _installSnapshot() comparison.

tasks.title: Add chain storage store actions
tasks.description: Add observables (customChainPath, chainStorageValidation, isChainStorageLoading, storageLocationConfirmed) and actions (setChainStorageDirectory, resetChainStorageDirectory, loadChainStorageConfig, confirmStorageLocation) to MithrilBootstrapStore

tasks.title: Add startup symlink verification
tasks.description: Call verifySymlink() during app init. Surface warning through MithrilBootstrapStore if broken symlink detected.

tasks.title: Test startup symlink verification IPC path
tasks.description: Add low-priority tests for main chainStorage IPC startup verification flow to ensure verifySymlink warnings are emitted for invalid custom targets.

tasks.title: Unit tests for ChainStorageManager
tasks.description: Test validate, setDirectory, resetToDefault, migrateData (including cross-device fallback), and verifySymlink with mocked fs

phases.name: i18n Message Extraction
phases.description: Extract and extend i18n messages before component decomposition. Follow i18n-messaging skill.

tasks.title: Extract i18n messages file
tasks.description: Create MithrilBootstrap.messages.ts with existing 19 messages plus ~14 new messages for stage-specific error titles/hints, download metadata labels, step indicator labels, and storage location picker (directory label, buttons, space, validation errors). Follow i18n-messaging skill conventions.

tasks.title: Run i18n manage workflow
tasks.description: Run 'yarn i18n:manage' to sync/validate translations for en-US and ja-JP

phases.name: Component Decomposition
phases.description: Break monolithic MithrilBootstrap.tsx into focused sub-components

tasks.title: MithrilStepIndicator - step logic and rendering
tasks.description: 4-step indicator (preparing, downloading, verifying, finalizing) with spinner/checkmark/pending states. Model on SyncingProgress.tsx.

tasks.title: MithrilStepIndicator - download metadata and SCSS
tasks.description: Add download metadata display (bytes, throughput) to active download step. Create SCSS with themed spinner animation.

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotSelector
tasks.description: Snapshot dropdown with truncated digest labels ({first8}...{last8}), locale-aware dates, and formatted size

tasks.title: Implement MithrilSnapshotDetails
tasks.description: Metadata grid (digest, date, size, node version) with truncated digest display

tasks.title: Implement MithrilErrorView
tasks.description: Stage-specific error screens (download, verify, convert, node-start, generic) with contextual titles/hints, collapsible error details, and log path link

tasks.title: Implement MithrilProgressView
tasks.description: Compose MithrilStepIndicator + ProgressBarLarge + timing metadata + cancel button

tasks.title: Clean up post-download progress phases
tasks.description: Expose an explicit 'Installing snapshot' stage for `_installSnapshot()` local chain move/copy work, fold Mithril verification into the download phase, and swap live transfer stats for local-processing copy once network download finishes.

tasks.title: Implement MithrilDecisionView
tasks.description: Decision screen with snapshot selector, details grid, and accept/decline buttons. Shown after storage location is confirmed.

tasks.title: BlockDataStorageLocationPicker - layout and path display
tasks.description: Preliminary screen before decision view showing the current blockchain-data path (default or custom), available disk space (formatted with prettysize), and Continue button to proceed to decision view

tasks.title: BlockDataStorageLocationPicker - picker and validation
tasks.description: Add directory picker via SHOW_OPEN_DIALOG_CHANNEL, validation feedback, reset-to-default link, migration spinner, and generic blockchain-data messaging. Disable the picker during active bootstrap.

tasks.title: Return from decision view to storage picker
tasks.description: Allow users to navigate back from the Fast sync with Mithril snapshot decision screen to BlockDataStorageLocationPicker so they can choose a better blockchain-data location before continuing.

tasks.title: Slim down root MithrilBootstrap.tsx
tasks.description: Reduce to overlay chrome + view delegation: storage picker -> decision -> progress/error. Create index.ts re-export.

tasks.title: Collapse visible progress to 3 steps
tasks.description: Update Mithril bootstrap progress so the user-visible flow is Preparing -> Downloading -> Finalizing. Keep verify inside download, fold post-download install/db-to-chain movement into finalizing, remove the lingering ~90% stall, and keep the Mithril overlay visible until local post-download work finishes.

tasks.title: Rename install states and copy to unpacking
tasks.description: Rename install-related post-download states, details, and messages to unpacking where they describe snapshot materialization work. Keep the visible 3-step UX as Preparing -> Downloading -> Finalizing, but stop leaking install wording into the finalizing phase.

tasks.title: Derive step labels from status
tasks.description: Remove `currentStep` as user-facing transport. Let MithrilProgressView and MithrilStepIndicator derive localized labels from MithrilBootstrapStatus, keep verify as an error stage only, and update shared types/store plumbing to stop depending on hardcoded step copy from the main process.

phases.name: Verifying & Finalizing UX
phases.description: Adopt the Phase 6 four-step model: Preparing, Downloading, Verifying, Finalizing. Keep the progress bar scoped to Downloading, move to Verifying when file download completes, and only expose local install progress if `_installSnapshot()` can report it honestly.

tasks.title: Refine backend phase boundaries
tasks.description: Update the Mithril service/status model for the planned `preparing -> downloading -> verifying -> finalizing` UX. Keep Downloading driven by the exposed file progress, transition to Verifying when that file download completes, rename Daedalus-side `unpacking` to `installing` for local DB placement work, and do not depend on Mithril JSON message strings for user-facing copy.

tasks.title: Wire 4-step progress UI
tasks.description: Extend shared Mithril status, store, container, and progress-view contracts for the visible `Preparing`, `Downloading`, `Verifying`, and `Finalizing` steps. Keep the determinate progress bar and estimated bytes/rate/timing metadata in Downloading only, keep Verifying and Finalizing minimal unless honest install telemetry is available, and confirm the extracted i18n messaging is appropriate for the exposed steps instead of surfacing Mithril JSON messages.

tasks.title: Validate install-progress exposure and coverage
tasks.description: Investigate whether `_installSnapshot()` / `fs.move()` can expose honest measured progress for Finalizing across the real move/copy paths. If it can, cover the measured-progress path; if it cannot, keep Finalizing activity-only and add focused backend and renderer tests for the Downloading-to-Verifying transition and the activity-only fallback.

phases.name: Theming & Styling
phases.description: Migrate hardcoded colors to CSS theme variables. Follow theme-management skill.

tasks.title: Migrate SCSS to theme variables
tasks.description: Replace hardcoded backdrop/card/text/button colors with --theme-mithril-* CSS custom properties

tasks.title: Add theme variables to createTheme
tasks.description: Add --theme-mithril-* variables to createTheme with light and dark values. Do NOT manually edit theme output files.

tasks.title: Run theme validation and update
tasks.description: Run 'yarn themes:check:createTheme' then 'yarn themes:update' to propagate to all theme files

tasks.title: Regenerate SCSS type definitions
tasks.description: Run 'yarn typedef:sass' to regenerate .scss.d.ts files

phases.name: Accessibility & Storybook
phases.description: Add a11y attributes and Storybook coverage. Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Add accessibility attributes
tasks.description: Add role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow/min/max, aria-live on step indicator, aria-label on interactive elements, keyboard nav

tasks.title: Storybook stories - Decision and Storage
tasks.description: Stories for: Decision (loading, with snapshots, selected snapshot), Storage (default path, custom path, validation error, migrating). Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Storybook stories - Progress and Error
tasks.description: Stories for: Progress (preparing, downloading early/mid, downloading late-verifying copy, finalizing with local telemetry), Error (download, verify, convert, node-start). Follow storybook-creation skill.

tasks.title: Register stories in barrel file
tasks.description: Add loading/ domain directory and import to storybook/stories/index.ts

phases.name: E2E Tests
phases.description: Cucumber BDD tests for Mithril bootstrap flow using the repo's backend-integrated app-flow pattern. Follow e2e-test-creation skill.

tasks.title: Create E2E feature file
tasks.description: Gherkin scenarios with @e2e tag covering decision screen (accept/decline bootstrap), progress stage advancement and cancel, error stage-specific messaging, and storage location (change, reset, insufficient space, disabled during sync). Exercise the real app/bootstrap flow using the repo's existing backend-integrated E2E pattern rather than direct Mithril store-state seeding.

tasks.title: Write E2E step definitions
tasks.description: Step definitions with SELECTORS const for CSS classes, async functions, Chai assertions, and repo-style E2E helpers/browser-context execution where needed for setup or assertions. Avoid direct Mithril store-state forcing for the primary flow. Follow e2e-test-creation skill.

phases.name: Verification
phases.description: Run all checks and verify correctness

tasks.title: Run verification suite
tasks.description: Run: yarn compile, yarn lint, yarn prettier:check, yarn themes:check:createTheme, yarn i18n:manage, yarn test:jest, yarn storybook, yarn typedef:sass
